emails.body_draft: hey team, yesterday's fight day the glue was just not it (I think the UltraHold Black under the jaw w/ sweat and dust made the area puff up), let's not do that again; can we move to ProSkin Bond or AquaFix Foam asap? also removal took forever and felt rough, would like CitrusFX Remover soak and pause before peel. If we can quickly do a patch test 2026-05-03 07:00 in trailer 2 that'd be solid. Also short on remover pads and ProSkin Bond (2 bottles left). I can swing by earlier. pls advise.
